title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
